home.description: Connecting Indian landowners with farmers who need land. Find the perfect plot for farming or list your land for rent – all in one trusted platform.
home.featuresSubtext: Our platform makes renting agricultural land simple, secure, and accessible for every Indian farmer.
home.card1Desc: Search land by location, soil type, crop suitability, area, and budget with ease.
home.card2Desc: All land listings are verified by our admin team for authenticity and trust.
home.card3Desc: Connect directly with landowners. No middlemen, no hidden fees – complete transparency.
home.card4Desc: Fully responsive platform accessible anytime, anywhere on any device.
home.card5Desc: Browse agricultural land listings across multiple Indian states and districts.
home.card6Desc: Upload documents securely and get support from our dedicated team anytime.
home.farmerStep1Desc: Sign up with your details and verify via OTP.
home.farmerStep2Desc: Fill in land area, crops, soil, location, rent & upload photos.
home.farmerStep3Desc: Our team reviews your listing for authenticity.
home.buyerStep2Desc: Narrow down by state, district, soil, crop, and budget.
home.buyerStep3Desc: Sign up to see complete contact details.
home.buyerStep4Desc: Call or message the landowner directly.
home.ctaHeading: Ready to Start Your Farming Journey?
home.ctaSubtext: Join thousands of Indian farmers and landowners who trust Rent Farming for connecting land with opportunity.

register.tagline: Create your account and start your farming journey.
